description: Vertical graphic from ICE for its VOICE (Victims of Immigration Crime Engagement) office. The right portion is a warm-lit photograph of two pairs of hands clasped together, with a person in a light-blue top seated and slightly blurred in the background. The left third is a semi-transparent blue panel overlay with white sans-serif text: 'If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to' followed by a large bold 'HELP.' An orange diagonal accent shape appears at the lower right of the photo. A white bottom bar contains contact info: '1-855-48-VOICE' and 'ICE.GOV/VOICE' (with 'VOICE' in blue/orange), a vertical divider, then the VOICE logo, a blue stylized 'V' checkmark beside 'VOICE' with the subtitle 'VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT.' The brand colors are blue and orange.
notable_text: If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to HELP - 1-855-48-VOICE / ICE.GOV/VOICE - VOICE: Victims of Immigration Crime Engagement
